THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK(USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOQUETAO, RODRIGO $1,192.49 PRINCIPAL, $458.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,650.99, (PRINCIPAL = $3,392.49 LESS $2,200.00 FOR PAYMENTS MADE TO DATE; TOTAL COSTS = $358.50 PLUS $10.00 PLUS $90.00. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR FULL DETAILS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK(USA), N.A.'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)
